message:
test(db): add 11 search_scope.rs tests for serialization, edge cases

Cover ScopeAuditEntry JSON serialization, ScopeContext serde roundtrip,
ScopedSearchResult scope metadata, ScopeSqlParam Debug, empty results
batch, ContactPolicyKind::as_str all variants, ScopeAuditSummary default,
Thread DocKind as NonMessageEntity, auto policy default fallback,
viewer among multiple recipients, SQL clause OR structure.

Search scope test count: 26 → 37.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
